title: Ukrainian-Style Potato Dumplings
description: A traditional Ukrainian dish made with boiled dumplings filled with a mixture of potatoes and other ingredients, served with a side of jammy sauce.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the grated potatoes, flour, eggs, sour cream (if using), and salt. Mix well until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5-7 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into small pieces and roll each piece into a ball.
Use a rolling pin to flatten each ball into a thin circle.
Place a tablespoon of filling in the center of each circle.
Fold the dough over the filling to form a half-circle shape, and press the edges together to seal the dumpling.
Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the dumplings for 10-12 minutes, or until they float to the surface.
While the dumplings are cooking, heat the jammy sauce in a saucepan over medium heat.
Once the dumplings are done, remove them from the water with a slotted spoon and serve with the jammy sauce.
